checks.name: installer-cli-surface
checks.detail: The bootstrap CLI exposes `happytg install`, renders install summaries, and includes the new command in `--help` usage.

checks.name: shared-installer-flow
checks.detail: The installer now covers platform detection, repo sync, dependency resolution, `.env` merge, Telegram-first onboarding, background setup, and post-check execution inside `packages/bootstrap`.

checks.name: telegram-token-handling
checks.detail: Interactive install collects the Telegram bot token, non-interactive install now requires `--telegram-bot-token`, and pairing guidance reuses the configured bot identity.

checks.name: platform-shims
checks.detail: macOS/Linux and Windows shims clone or update the repo and invoke the shared TypeScript installer via `pnpm dlx tsx`, avoiding a broken dependency on untracked dist output.

checks.name: release-metadata
checks.detail: Workspace versions were bumped to `0.3.0`, `CHANGELOG.md` and `docs/releases/0.3.0.md` were added, and `pnpm release:check --version 0.3.0` passed.

checks.name: repo-doctor
checks.detail: pnpm happytg doctor completed with expected local-environment warnings only: missing `.env` and Redis not running on localhost:6379.

checks.name: repo-verify
checks.detail: pnpm happytg verify completed with the same expected local-environment warnings only; no installer-specific regressions were introduced.
